programme.title: Dr. Aditi Nerurkar
programme.desc: Dr. Aditi Nerurkar is a doctor and global public health expert who specialises in stress, resilience and burnout. She discusses everything from the need to create digital boundaries, to why multitasking is a myth.

programme.title: A Perfect Christmas

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: A chauffeur's naive daughter falls for the playboy son of her father's wealthy employers, to the dismay of the young man's business-minded older brother. The girl is heartbroken when she realises the man has only been toying with her affections, and her father sends her to a French school to repair the damage. She returns a glittering and refined young lady, at last awakening the son's interest.

programme.desc: Following her killer debut tour last year, the 'fearless, provocative, and very funny' Ria Lina (Scotsman) realises that she is ready to rebel. Named by the Evening Standard as one of the Hottest Comedians You Should Be Watching Now, expect a relentless stream of hilarity as Ria explores the delight of throwing life up in the air after years of following the rules.

programme.title: The I.T. Crowd
programme.desc: When a bad bra causes Jen to lose concentration in a board meeting, Moss invents a bra.

programme.title: The I.T. Crowd
programme.desc: Douglas hires Jen as his new PA.

programme.title: Empire Records
programme.desc: Employees of an independent record store stage a fund-raiser to buy the business.

programme.title: Nerdy Kid Becomes Basketball Champion
programme.desc: A former NBA player, Darrell, loses his way after an injury, facing unemployment, a breakup, and a DUI. Sentenced to coach a neurodivergent high school basketball team, he finds redemption, reconnects with his passion, and rebuilds his life.

programme.title: Kung Fu Master Saves The Day
programme.desc: A dedicated teacher uses empathy to connect with troubled students with difficult pasts. When faced with budget cuts and a potential firing, his students' newfound academic success, fueled by his influence, saves the school and secures his job.

programme.title: Teen Regrets Teasing Rich Kid
programme.desc: A wealthy but lonely teen, Garrett, attempts suicide, feeling unloved. Saved by an unlikely trio—a homeless man, a poor classmate, and a school bully—he realizes his profound impact on their lives and finds the belonging he craved.

programme.title: Kid Builds Waterpark In House
programme.desc: Jay plans an epic waterpark party for Gretchen's birthday to impress her, but it gets busted by the cops. Despite the chaos, Gretchen is touched by his thoughtfulness, and they become a couple, much to their parents' amusement.

programme.title: Lady Refuses to Give Up Baby
programme.desc: Emily, a pregnant surrogate, is forced by her gambler boyfriend, Seth, to steal from the baby's parents. When Seth tries to kidnap the baby, Emily calls the police. A nanny cam reveals Seth's coercion, freeing Emily and exposing his true nature.

programme.title: Performers Compete For Street Corner
programme.desc: Two street musicians, Mary and Jared, fiercely compete for a prime spot, each driven by personal hardships. Their rivalry turns to harmony when they realize their combined talent earns more, leading to an unlikely friendship and shared shelter.

programme.title: Influencer Gets Canceled
programme.desc: Driven by fame and wealth, an influencer's ego spirals, leading to self-sabotage, public backlash, and financial ruin. Stripped of her former life, she finds humility working in a convenience store.

programme.title: Rich Bride Kicks Out Poor Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Mindy, a bridezilla, pushes away her lifelong best friend Yazmin, who can't afford the extravagant wedding demands. When disaster strikes on the wedding day, Yazmin steps in to save it, reminding Mindy that true friendship matters more than lavish displays.

programme.title: Single Mom vs Rich Mom
programme.desc: Polly, a struggling single mom, faces constant judgment from wealthy Sharon. Despite setbacks, Polly launches a successful business based on her "mommy hacks." When Sharon faces financial hardship, Polly offers her a job and support, embodying true kindness.

programme.title: Popular Girl Has Secret Crush On Nerd
programme.desc: Bentley, a high school heartbreaker, makes a bet to win over Rose, enlisting her friend Reggie's help. Reggie's growing feelings for Rose and Bentley's deceit lead to a prom-night confrontation, exposing truths and revealing true connections.

programme.title: Intern Fired By Mean Boss
programme.desc: Ambitious intern Joe, dismissed by his CEO, defies expectations by secretly developing a groundbreaking dating app. Fired for his unauthorized work, Joe launches his own company, eventually eclipsing his former boss and becoming a tech success story.

programme.title: Girl Fakes As Guy To Play Football
programme.desc: Kate, a talented cheerleader, dreams of playing football. Despite her boyfriend's disapproval and the coach's sexism, she disguises herself as a boy to join the team, ultimately proving her skill and inspiring other girls.

programme.title: Homeless Man Richer Than Millionaire
programme.desc: Motivated by a millionaire mentor, Chris relentlessly pursues wealth, sacrificing family time. A tragic death forces him to re-evaluate his priorities, leading him to choose family over fortune, embracing true happiness.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: S1:E1 The Harts - The Harts are desperate to sell their three-bedroom, chalet-style Thundersley home so they can move to Australia with their five kids. But after ten months on the market, they've had only two viewings and not a single offer. The scruffy, canine-scented home has plenty of potential…

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: S1:E2 Ms. Crabbe - Hoping to join her boyfriend Down Under, 26-year-old London lawyer Maria is desperate to sell her childhood home in Copthorne, Sussex. But after ten months – and a whopping £50,000 price cut – she hasn't received a single offer.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: S1:E3 The Burts - Hoping to make a quick sale to start her new life in the country, Chris Burt has dropped the price of her four-bedroom, 1970s-style house on bustling Canvey Island. But after four months on the market, she's still waiting. The home's location and modern kitchen have lots of appeal…

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: S1:E4 The Timms - Party-loving homeowners, Linda and Lee dream of traveling the world… But after two years on the market, and over 80 viewings, they're still stuck in their three-bedroom, 1950s terrace home in Swindon, Wiltshire.

programme.title: I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: S1:E13 Wall Of Shame - Cindy is a doer. So when the family homestead started to feel too small for the constant mess of guests that visited, she did something. She tore out a wall. Unfortunately, that wall is what keeps the roof up! And now the house is in peril of collapsing.

programme.title: I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: S1:E14 The Tear Down - When Vitoria had a baby, her stepdad Joe decided he'd buy her a house and fix it up himself. Unfortunately, he muds like a three-year-old with clay and His roofing fixes involve tape and a bucket. As a result, Vitoria's house is unliveable and looks like it just may have to be condemned.

programme.title: I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: S1:E15 The Turtle Room - Dan took all the doors off the cupboards, sanded them, and then put some finish on them and voilà: they looked terrible. So, he didn't put them up. Now, his cupboards have no doors, his kitchen a disaster, and when you look into the opening between the kitchen and living rooms you see turtles.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge
programme.desc: S1:E2 Outdoor Food - We all enjoy eating outdoors in a Great British beer garden and in this episode Tom wants to show us how to do outdoor food properly. He believes we should give our outdoor cooking the same love and attention you would when cooking in your kitchen and that's exactly what he does.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge
programme.desc: S1:E3 Celebratory Food - In this episode Tom shows us how to cook dishes inspired by food you'd order in a decent British pub to celebrate a special occasion. These dishes are slightly showy, decadent and indulgent yet still really simple to make.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge
programme.desc: S1:E4 Pub Classics - Classics are classics because they're great and Tom wants to show us how to cook some of the nation's favourite pub meals at home and get them spot on. This episode is packed full of crowd pleasers and is definitely one not to miss.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge
programme.desc: S1:E5 Sunday Lunches - For many of us Sunday lunches are one of our favourite pub food experiences. Sundays are a time to relax over cooking and enjoy a hearty lunch with family and friends and Tom wants to show us how to make our usual Sunday roasts a bit more special.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: In this episode of Snack Wars, mgk puts classic British and American snacks to the test! After a couple of sausage-based innuendos, mgk feels like a proper British gentleman with a cup of Earl Grey tea and teaches us all about the 'Pretzel plant'. Former England Lionesses Mille Bright and Rachel Daly are the latest footballers to play a game of Snack Wars: England vs The Rest of Europe. Ahead of the UEFA Women's Euros 2025, Bright and Daly try marmite and compare pickled walnuts to sauerkraut.

programme.title: Would You Rather?
programme.desc: Things get weird when Chris Evans, Dakota Johnson, and Pedro Pascal play LADbible's game of Would You Rather? From farting bubbles to bees in butts (yep, seriously), they're debating some of the silliest and strangest hypothetical scenarios! Get ready for chaos as Jurassic World: Rebirth stars Scarlett Johansson, Jonathan Bailey, Mahershala Ali, and Rupert Friend debate whether they'd rather have their camera roll exposed or their group chat leaked in this wild game of Would You Rather!

programme.title: Swipe Stuff
programme.desc: Lily James takes on LADbible's Swipe Stuff, where celebrities swipe yes or no on everything from pop culture to guilty pleasures. From Sabrina Carpenter to UGGs and Mamma Mia 3 to TOWIE, she's sharing her opinion and she doesn't hold back!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: It's a North London derby with Lee Judges from Arsenal Fan TV and Spurs YouTuber George Achilles! Is Kane better than Henry? Did Sol Campbell make the correct decision? Are the Invincibles overrated? We're settling these arguments once and for all!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Spurs fan Flav goes up against Chelsea fan Rory Jennings to debate the biggest arguments between the two London rivals, including whether Tottenham Hotspur will finish above Chelsea this season, and is Harry Kane the best Striker in Premier League history?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Eddie Hearn and Frank Warren debate some of boxing's biggest debates. The two promoters discuss Anthony Joshua vs Tyson Fury? Which Premier League player would make the best boxer? As well as debates about Jake Paul and MrBeast.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Katy Morgan-Davies opens up about being born into a London cult. Known as the 'Communist Collective' and led by her father, she discusses being locked in the house for 30 years, the power dynamics of the group and the abuse she experienced.

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: The wonderful Sister Gabriel answers the questions you've always wanted to ask a nun, explaining her commitment to a 'cloistered' life and the surprising career path she had beforehand, while reflecting on a life of celibacy.

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: Rob Fuller, Chief Yeoman Warder, or 'Beefeater' at The Tower of London, is answering your questions on the origin of the historic role in the days of Henry VII and reveals where he has a portrait of Queen Elizabeth II tattooed on his body.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode we hear from Will Geddes, a bodyguard for the rich and famous. Will has done it all - from protecting a-list celebrities to being involved in firefights while working in Iraq. Will takes us through some tricks of the trade, including some of the gadgets he uses while on the job. In this episode we hear from Pam Fraser, a nudist, who tells us all about the advantages of living a naked life.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: John Massey, at one point England's longest-serving prisoner, spent an astonishing 43 years behind bars. John candidly shares his life story with us, including the murder that led him to prison, his four daring escapes, and his eventual release.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: This week, we sat down with anti-knife crime activist Faron Paul to discuss how he survived being stabbed 18 times, and how he campaigns against knife crime, taking over 1200 weapons off the streets of London.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Paul Page used to work as a royal protection officer, providing security to the members of the Royal family. Here, he tells us the biggest security threat to the Royals and why Prince Andrew was the most difficult and unpleasant to deal with.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: In this episode of Snack Wars, Korean band ENHYPEN try snacks from the UK and Korea! The boys are surprisingly BIG fans of Malteasers, get stuck into classic British Jaffa Cakes, and are split when it comes down to a Dairylea Lunchable! West Ham players Tomáš Souček, James Ward-Prowse and Niclas Füllkrug are the latest Premier League footballers to tackle a game of Snack Wars, tasting and rating food from the UK and wider world, including treats from Italy, Nigeria and Australia.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Saoirse Ronan tries snacks from the UK and Ireland! As well as making a Tayto crisp sandwich, she tries (and fails) to pour Guinness out of the can and declares her love for Jammie Dodgers. Craig David tries UK and US snacks, rating chips and revealing what surprising thing he did while working at McDonald's. Watch as he re-lives his childhood by trying Ribena and Hula Hoops for the first time in years!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: House of the Dragon stars Matt Smith and Paddy Considine play a funny game of Snack Wars! Paddy attempts to make chewing gum bubbles and they both have a great time trying to eat melted ice cream. Louis Tomlinson enjoys another episode of Snack Wars! This time he has a hilarious reaction to eating haggis, shares his thoughts on McDonald's and we even see try his first ever gin shot!

programme.title: Four In A Bed
programme.desc: The competitors head to Merseysides Kirkby Park where Peter and Sharron host their fellow B and B owners, but poor finishing means the guests feel less than at home.

programme.title: Four In A Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Andy and Julians North Wales retreat of Plas Dinas Country House. An upmarket B and B where rooms cost up to 250, but, its not to everyones taste.

programme.title: Four In A Bed

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: A woman is caught body packing highly illegal objects. Meanwhile, there's trouble in Biosecurity.

programme.desc: Two longboarders run into strife during their border exam, and a traveller gets caught out in a lie. A sailor has something mysterious in his pockets, while an American family's hoard of weapons make for suspicious road trip supplies.

programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programme.desc: An ex-criminal discovers that an honest approach is the best way forward, and agents discover the reasons behind a traveller's lengthy trip overseas. An Alaskan couple won't compromise on their weapons.

programme.desc: Adjustments to the subspace sensor array inadvertently establish a link to aliens who begin kidnapping crew members for experiments.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A young honour student serving aboard the Enterprise is torn between remaining a part of the crew or accepting an offer made by Q.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E28
programme.desc: Inspired by a demonstration of an electric garage door, Samantha opens her garage by twitching her nose. Plagued by Gladys about this, Abner questions Darrin. To cover up, Darrin foregoes new fishing gear and buys a remote control for the garage. When radio signals from passing planes operate the door at random, Samantha asks Darrin to return the device and use the money for fishing gear. Darrin refuses to believe Samantha and she swears never to use magic again. Later, Samantha and Darrin are t...

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E29
programme.desc: Gladys Kravitz catches Samantha twitching her nose to rearrange pictures on a wall.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E30
programme.desc: Darrin lends a helping hand to D. D. (Danger) O'Riley, a beautiful nineteen-year-old neighbor. As Darrin spends more and more time with D.D., Samantha turns to solitaire. Endora sees a chance to break up the Stephens marriage. She takes George, a warlock, from his harem and persuades him to romance Samantha. Learning George's purpose, Samantha declares she is perfectly happy married to Darrin. Undaunted, George, in the form of a raven, flies to Darrin's office, where Darrin and Larry Tate are working on a campaign for an electric typewriter. George flies into the room and begins to type on the new machine. Darrin and Larry feel the raven is the perfect image for a series of T.V. commercials. When Samantha tells Darrin who George really is, George materializes into human form and gets mixed up for awhile with D.D. Endora is miffed. When realizing that his witchcraft is powerless against the love Samantha and Darrin have for each other, George returns to his harem.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E32
programme.desc: After an argument, Gladys Kravitz locks her husband out of their home. The Stephens invite Abner to spend the night at their place. Later, when it appears that Abner, using all his privileges as a guest, is more than satisfied with the arrangements and is making no effort to return to his own home, Darrin demands that Samantha take action. Not only is Samantha unsuccessful in all her attempts to effect a reconciliation, but she learns that Gladys wants a divorce. When all else fails, Samantha gets the idea of using sleep therapy to reunite the Kravitzes. Feeling that one of the happiest days of her life is the day a man proposes marriage, and a woman accepts him, Samantha projects Gladys and Abner in their dreams back to that day. Then she awakens them and each begins looking for the other. Later, as Samantha and Darrin look forward to spending an evening at home alone, the Kravitzes arrive to celebrate their reunion.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E33
programme.desc: As Darrin naps in the living room, Endora points out some of the unfortunate details of his face. Samantha at first protests when her mother, using witchcraft, changes Darrin's looks but then adds some touches of her own. Awakening, Darrin demands an explanation. Samantha can't explain why she and Endora were changing his features, and Darrin begins to worry. As the obsession grows, Samantha decides to build up her husband's ego. Changing her own personality, Samantha becomes a French sculptress, Michelle. She tells Darrin his face exudes the masculine appeal she has always tried to find in a model. Darrin turns down Michelle's request that he pose for her, suspecting that she is Samantha. A substitute secretary, Barbara Lucas, appears at the office and Darrin, thinking it is another of Samantha's tricks, makes a play for her, just as Samantha walks in. Her jealous reaction convinces Darrin that Samantha really loves him. Darrin explains be thought she was posing as Barbara, but leaves Samantha with an uncertain feeling.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E35
programme.desc: Samantha and Endora discover the culinary delights of Mario's restaurant. Mario tells them he is going broke because he refuses to sell pizza. Samantha learns that Darrin's agency has a new client, Linton Baldwin, the owner of a large chain of pizza parlors. When Samantha uses witchcraft to get a huge newspaper ad for Mario, and Endora inserts a plug for him on Baldwin's TV program, Baldwin tells Larry Tate he is cancelling his account and signing with the agency handling Mario's restaurant. Realizing Darrin's career is in jeopardy, Samantha persuades Endora to help save the Baldwin account for Darrin. They lay out a spectacular advertising campaign for Baldwin and give the credit to Darrin's agency. Not only does Baldwin ask Darrin's agency to keep his account, but Mario's restaurant becomes a great success.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E36
programme.desc: Almost as determined as Endora to break up Samantha's marriage to a mere mortal, Samantha's cousin Edgar, an elf, begins playing pranks on Darrin. Darrin's agency has been trying to hold onto the Shelley Shoe account. Edgar, invisible to all, plagues Darrin in his office. Darrin is sure Endora is working on him again, and has difficulty persuading Larry Tate to let him present the new campaign to Mr. Shelley. At the sales meeting, Fred Schulwiler, as unscrupulous competitor, almost gets the account when he makes it appear that Darrin is trying to make Mr. Shelley look ridiculous. When Samantha convinces Edgar that she is very happy with Darrin, he switches his attentions to Schulwiler. Before Edgar is through, Schulwiler has lost all chance of landing the Shelley account. Darrin, coming up with an advertising campaign featuring an elf not unlike Edgar, ties up the account for his firm.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E37
programme.desc: Samantha's Aunt Clara arrives on the Stephens' first anniversary with presents for Samantha and Darrin. Casting a spell to adjust a checkered cap she has given Darrin, Aunt Clara uses the wrong words and turns Darrin into a chimpanzee. Unable to remember how to remove the spell, Aunt Clara goes home to look for the formula. When Samantha leaves the house, Endora stays with Darrin. Darrin leaps out of a window and runs into Gladys Kravitz. She takes the chimp back to her house. Soon after, Aunt Clara comes with her book of magic, Samantha returns. Samantha tells Aunt Clara she must find Darrin since her doctor has told her she is going to have a baby. Meanwhile, Gladys and Abner have turned Darrin over to the zoo, where he is caged with three other chimps. Samantha goes to the zoo. Then Aunt Clam arrives and turns Darrin back to his former self. Samantha is finally able to tell him he is to be a father. Later, Gladys begins telling the Stephens about the chimpanzee. Suddenly realizing that Darrin is wearing the same outfit as the chimp, Gladys streaks back to her own house.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E38
programme.desc: Learning that he is about to become a father, Darrin waits on Samantha hand and foot. Then Larry Tate convinces him that all women would make a career out of having a baby if you allowed them to. He gives Darrin a book on the subject which states that the more active the mother, the happier she will be, and the healthier the child. Darrin returns home completely convinced. Endora is infuriated when she hears Darrin ordering Samantha to do chores around the house. The following day, Darrin wakes up with a backache. At an office lunch, he fights for extra pickles. When Samantha learns of this, she faces up to her mother. Endora admits she has cast a spell over Darrin, but will do nothing to change the situation for the present. Darrin, dis-cussing his plight at a bar, becomes obsessed with the idea that he is going to have a baby himself. Finally, Endora removes the spell and Darrin becomes completely attentive to Samantha once more. She agrees with Darrin's assertion that he is one man in a million who knows just how she feels.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E39
programme.sub-title: We'Re In For A Bad Spell
programme.desc: When strange things begin happening to Adam Newlarkin, a friend of Darrin's, Aunt Clara tells Samantha he has inherited the spell placed by a witch on his ancestor who was a judge in Salem two hundred years before. Aunt Clara adds that unless Adam follows the antidote for the spell strictly, he will be branded a thief. The Stephens learn that Adam has been hired by a local bank. Samantha and Darrin manage to get Adam to kiss a dog, the first step. With Aunt Clara's help, Darrin dunks Adam in a pool three times. They have trouble persuading him to ride through town shouting praise of witches, which is the final step. However, finding his briefcase stuffed with money , Adam, a true native of Salem, believes he is under a spell. He mounts a horse and starts riding. Bank manager Abercrombie and a detective, having discovered the loss of seventy five thousand dollars, come to the Stephens' home. Aunt Clara makes the money disappear from the briefcase. Abercrombie apologizes to Adam after learning that a bank employee has been taken into custody with the stolen cash.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E40
programme.desc: Phoning from London, the Tates inform the Stephens that their governess has been taken ill. They ask Darrin and Samantha to care for the child until they return. Gladys Kravitz sees them leaving the house and returning with a baby. Assuming the Stephens' baby has arrived, Gladys congratulates Maurice, Samantha's father, on the birth of his grandson. Maurice is shocked to find the baby is not being taught witchcraft. He flies away with the child to the Warlock's Club in London. Meanwhile, the Tates arrive at the local airport. Darrin tries to stall while Samantha finds their baby. In London, after many tests, the Warlocks tell Maurice the baby "hasn't got it." Nanny Witch adds that the baby is a mortal like the father. At the Stephens home, Samantha and Darrin are about to tell the Tates their baby is missing, when Maurice arrives with the child. Maurice's pride is restored when Samantha tells him her baby is not due for several months. Arriving with a present, Gladys is told to wait until Samantha's baby is born. Before vanishing through a wall, Maurice hands Gladys a martini. Watching Gladys down it, Samantha hopes she will not remember what she has seen and heard.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E41
programme.desc: Samantha arranges a meeting between Darrin and her mother which she hopes will settle their differences. A series of minor accidents sets Darrin and Endora accusing each other of being practical pokers. Realizing someone else is responsible, Samantha uncovers a serving dish and reveals her Uncle Arthur, who dotes on practical jokes. Infuriated by Darrin's uproarious appreciation of Uncle Arthur, Endora plants a Beatles hairdo on Darrin. Darrin refuses Uncle Arthur's offer to teach him some magic so he can stand up to Endora, until he is knocked out by an accident in the office. Certain Endora is at work, Darrin accepts Uncle Arthur's offer. Following Uncle Arthur's weird instructions, Darrin tries to make Endora disappear. When she does not, Darrin realizes he has been the victim of another of Uncle Arthur's pranks. Samantha enlists Endora and Darrin in a plan to cure Uncle Arthur. Arthur is incredulous when Darrin says he can turn Endora into a parrot. When Endora becomes a parrot (through her own witchcraft), Arthur pleads with Darrin to remove the spell. Endora then returns to normal and demands that Arthur stop his practical jokes, which Uncle Arthur accepts. Before leaving, Uncle Arthur gives Endora a pair of opera glasses. When she lowers them she has two black eyes.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E42
programme.sub-title: Take Two Aspirins And Half A Pint Of Porpoise Milk
programme.desc: While Howard Norton shows the Stephens a black Peruvian rose, Samantha tells Darrin she feels ill and has lost her witchcraft. The doctor tells Samantha that her health is perfect. Gladys sees the doctor's car and brings some chicken soup. When square green spots appear on Samantha's face, Abner is sure the chicken soup is responsible. Aunt Clara arrives and lists the ingredients for a remedy. Darrin buys all the ingre-dients, except an ostrich feather, from Mr. Trigby, who caters to witches. Trying to take the ostrich feather from a woman's hat, Darrin is arrested but later released. Aunt Clara, after using witchcraft to produce an ostrich, tells Darrin she still needs four petals from a black Peruvian rose. Darrin is arrested when he tries to steal the petals from Mr. Norton's precious bloom. Finally, Aunt Clara concocts the remedy and cures Samantha. Later, Mr. Norton is astonished when he sees a window box filled with black Peruvian roses Samantha has produced by twitching her nose.

programme.desc: Lorsqu'une arrestation prématurée compromet une importante saisie de drogue, Andy tente de s'infiltrer avec Swarek. Mais un changement de plan radical met leur vie en danger.

programme.title: Butterflies
programme.desc: La vie d'Andy bascule quand elle reçoit une balle perdue lors d'une fusillade qui ôte la vie à une étudiante. En cherchant une explication, Andy entre en conflit avec une nouvelle détective.

programme.title: Might Have Been
programme.desc: Andy et Gail jouent les serveuses afin de démanteler un trafic de drogue, Traci lutte contre ses sentiments pour Jerry, et Dov et Chris entrent en désaccord concernant une plainte.

programme.title: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: Alors qu'ils enquêtent sur un vol de têtes coupées, Andy et Swarek retrouvent la trace d'un homme mentalement instable, et exposent malencontreusement Luke à de terribles conséquences.

programme.title: Heart & Sparks
programme.desc: Une série d'incendies frappe une laverie. Chris et Gail rencontrent un homme lié au passé de Chris, Traci interroge une jeune incendiaire, et Andy se retrouve piégée dans les flammes.

programme.title: Stung
programme.desc: Un criminel donne une info qui pousse Dov et Chris dans une maison piégée. Traci et Andy font ce qu'elles peuvent pour une suspecte SDF. Luke et Jo travaillent ensemble sur une surveillance.

programme.title: In Plain View
programme.desc: Un informateur est retrouvé assassiné. Andy fait équipe avec l'inspectrice Jo Rosati, qui semble bien intéressée par Luke. Gail doit protéger un jeune témoin qui cache un lourd secret.

programme.title: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Une femme est agressée à l'identique qu'une recrue décédée, et Luke Callaghan est sûr qu'il s'agit du même suspect. Mais comme on lui retire l'affaire, il convainc Andy de suivre sa théorie.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Black And White
programme.desc: A suicide bomber is sent to India to kill people during India's Independence Day celebrations. His life changes when he befriends a professor to successfully carry out his mission.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.11
programme.desc: Waking up in the hospital, Gun shows symptoms suggesting a hereditary illness and doesn't remember Mi Young. Though confused and hurt, she stays by his side. Se Ra seizes the chance to be with Gun as much as possible, but as she realizes how strong Gun and Mi Young's bond still is, she feels threatened.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.12
programme.desc: Mi Young attends the final prenatal class alone—until Gun unexpectedly shows up. Gun breaks up with Se Ra, and Se Ra asks Mi Young to break up with Gun. Overwhelmed, Mi Young tells Daniel, who is leaving for France, that she wants to go with him.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.13
programme.desc: Mi Young makes a successful exhibition debut with Daniel, and when Gun sees them together, jealousy flares. Chairwoman Wang is still pulling every string to get Gun married, but it isn't easy Se Ra is bitter about their lack of progress. Meanwhile, Mi Young runs into Gun outside her hotel room.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.14
programme.desc: Daniel finally finds the younger sister he has been searching for, and Gun is crestfallen to hear Mi Young plans to return to France. Yong suggests recruiting a female artist as a key strategic move for the company—and recommends Mi Young—but she turns Gun's business proposal down. Meanwhile, Daniel formally proposes to Mi Young.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.15
programme.desc: Chairwoman Wang sounds Mi Young out about reconciling with Gun, but Mi Young is resolute. Gun, as usual, visits Mi Young's mother's restaurant and runs into Mi Young there she asks him not to come anymore. Later, Mi Young is selected as the artist for Jangin Chemicals' ad-image collaboration project.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.16
programme.desc: Gun provides wholehearted support for the collaboration, while Mi Young grows uncomfortable with his constant presence at her side. Se Ra becomes increasingly uneasy about Mi Young's return.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.17

programme.title: Dear Hyeri (English dubbing) Ep.7

programme.title: The Mafia With Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: For the first time on British television, Trevor McDonald takes viewers on an immersive journey into the American Mafia gaining close access to people who have experienced firsthand the money, glamour and violence of the United States' most famous organised crime network. Travelling to cities across the United States, Trevor gets inside the lives of people on all sides of the Mafia story, many of whom have never spoken on television before. From ‘made' men who have risen to the heights of power to ruthless killers who have pulled the trigger on the orders of their bosses, Trevor meets men – and their families – who today live in shadow of their time in the Mob.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Investigate released documents regarding alien and UFO encounters, made accessible to the public in 2011 by the Freedom of Information Act. programme.title: S1 E9 Tsunami
programme.desc: Tsunamis are one of the most terrifying forces of nature.

programme.title: S1 E12 Hawaii
programme.desc: The Hawaiian Islands are the most remote island chain on the planet.

programme.title: S2 E3 Birth of the Earth
programme.desc: Four and a half billion years ago the Earth formed from dust in space.

programme.title: S2 E7 Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Almost 25,000 miles long, it is one of the most awesome sights on Earth.

programme.title: S2 E13 America's Gold
programme.desc: Gold originates from our solar system's supernova, concentrated on Earth.

programme.title: S6 E4 Crash Landing on Mars
programme.desc: We'll show what astronauts must do to survive dust storms and space radiation.

programme.title: S1 E2 Mars: The Red Planet
programme.desc: It has been fifty years since man first ventured into space.

programme.title: S3 E4 Sex in Space
programme.desc: Probe the physiological, psychological and cultural challenges of sex in space.

programme.title: Cheetah: Beating the Odds
programme.desc: A cheetah raises her young family on the vast expanse of the Serengeti. If her cubs are going to survive, she'll have to overcome a barrage of challenges. Lions, gangsters of the plains, are quick to throw their muscle around, whilst hyenas and jackals attempt to steal anything the cheetah manage to kill. The cheetah will have to learn the hunting skills their mother has perfected. Once they've learnt the ropes, they'll make their own way across the plains, establishing territory and having cubs of their own.

programme.title: Mega Nature
programme.desc: The largest animals are some of the most awe-inspiring, but when smaller species come together their combined forces can be even greater.

programme.title: Mountains
programme.desc: Mountains define some of our most spectacular landscapes, creating a mosaic of dramatic habitats, teaming with incredible wildlife. Mountains are found on every continent on Earth, covering 22% of the planet's surface. They're a vital part of our ecosystem a quarter of terrestrial animal and plant species live in mountains and they house an incredible 85% of all amphibians, mammals and birds. It's no wonder that so many cultures consider mountains sacred places: gateways to the heavens.

programme.title: Hidden Germany
programme.desc: A dramatic country steeped in history and ancient culture, it's easy to focus on Germany's great cities and landmarks. But Germany also has a more hidden treasure-trove, one full of natural wonders

programme.title: Nature's Most Dangerous
programme.desc: Who's not a thrill seeker among us? We humans love to put ourselves at risk and lap up the thrill of living dangerously. And to fuel our fetish for fear, we turn to the animal kingdom. But what is the truth behind the killers of the natural world? Do they live up to their reputations, and who really is the most dangerous? From killer crocs to ferocious big cats, we'll run you through the most dangerous teeth, fangs, stingers and bites in the animal kingdom. These are the deadliest animals on planet earth.

programme.title: Brown Bears Teddy Bears Picnic
programme.desc: If you go down to the woods today a wonderful treat awaits! The home of one of the planet's most loved and characterful animals – the brown bear. Baby bears have a lot to learn about life in the forest, but thankfully all bears know their way around a good picnic.

programme.title: Cheetah: Beating the Odds
programme.desc: A cheetah raises her young family on the vast expanse of the Serengeti. If her cubs are going to survive, she'll have to overcome a barrage of challenges. Lions, gangsters of the plains, are quick to throw their muscle around, whilst hyenas and jackals attempt to steal anything the cheetah manage to kill. The cheetah will have to learn the hunting skills their mother has perfected. Once they've learnt the ropes, they'll make their own way across the plains, establishing territory and having cubs of their own.

programme.title: Antarctica
programme.sub-title: Tales from the End of the World
programme.desc: The Antarctic region is undoubtedly one of the most remote and inhospitable, yet one of the most beautiful landscapes of the world. This documentary takes us on a journey to the stormy isolated islands of the Southern Ocean. Seals, penguins, seabirds and numerous other animals live and breed in this hostile environment and harsh climate. Only by an icebreaker can we reach the remote coasts of the Antarctic continent where Emperor Penguins defy the life-threatening environment of the vast ice desert at the end of the world.

programme.title: A Winter's Tale
programme.sub-title: The Journey of the Snowy Owls
programme.desc: Snowy owls live a life full of mystery up in the Arctic. Thousands of years ago, they built a community of fate with their neighbors – lemmings. About every four years, lemmings proliferate in huge numbers. This way, snowy owls have enough feed for their young. The owls lay up to eleven eggs and can successfully raise the chicks – each of them needs two to four lemmings per day. Lately, however, lemmings' mass reproduction hasn't been as regular in some parts of the Tundra. What will happen to them and the snowy owls? What is the ecological link here? And what will happen if one year the winter arrives way too early? The best way for many birds to adapt to the winter is to flee to the South. But lemmings can't migrate and have to endure temperatures as low as -40°C. Meanwhile, if the winter is too cold and the snow level too high, even the perfectly adapted owls have to migrate in order to survive. A fascinating journey from the Arctic to Central Europe begins. Following the owls on this uncommon path, the viewer learns how animals adapt to the inhospitable climate conditions, what ecological restraints bear down on the northern fauna and which fantastic survival strategies the animals can develop. This unique documentary tells a fascinating and breathtaking story: as in a fairy tale, the snowy owls leave us a message from the changing Arctic.

programme.title: mareTV: In Alaska's Fjord World
programme.desc: Gigantic fjords and over 5,000 small islands: In Alaska's south there's a lot of wilderness and little civilization. The region between the capital Juneau and the Canadian border is also known by locals as the "Last Frontier", the last outpost. Michelle Masden, for example, has come to terms with the harsh conditions here. She is the only seaplane pilot in the region. She earns her living with her 65-year-old Beaver: as an air taxi, transport plane and now and then as a rescuer in last necessity. Michelle flies anything and everything: spare parts and food, doctors, hikers and hunters. For the fishermen of southern Alaska she searches for large shoals of fish and guides the captains to the next good catch. Ray Rusaw was a car mechanic by profession, but in his old age he was gripped by gold fever. With a self-built special raft and a highly creative selection of equipment from the DIY store, he sets off in search of the precious metal that his predecessors overlooked two centuries ago. For four years he has been happily obsessively combing through sandbanks and river courses. For Ray, the search for gold has little to do with luck and much to do with meticulous research. He is certain that he has found the perfect spot.

programme.title: The Last Paradises: Breath of the Arctic
programme.desc: This foray through northern realms of our planet above the polar circle takes us to a part of our world especially affected by climate change. The often-cited adaptability of animals could also enable them to survive under new conditions. The camera team made this foray through the polar region, from Canada to Norway, to document that, which in the opinion of many nature researchers, will no longer be visible in 30 to 50 years' time. Following the observation of ice bear mother with her young in Canada's Wapusk National Park at Hudson Bay, is a herd of harp seals on the ice during the breeding season. The Arctic Ocean ringed seals in Hudson Bay, on the other hand, prefer solitude. Should the offspring be born in an extremely cold night, they often freeze to death. Their bodies sink to the seabed at the beginning of spring when the pack ice thaws. Scavengers like the rare Greenland shark, who sees them as a welcome snack, quickly eats them. Underwater footage of this process also attempted by our camera team, very rarely succeeds.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: In accordance with the seasons and with deep respect of nature, people all over the world celebrate their long-standing traditions. Near the outermost border of Europe, in Bashkiria, generations of bee keepers have collected honey from rare wild bees, the Burzyan bees. In Japan the last of the Usho catch fish with "living fishing rods": trained cormorants. Traditionally, they provided the Emperor's family with fresh fish. In Poland carp are fished from the ponds to provide everybody with carp for Christmas dinner - this is an old Polish tradition. In Frisia winter is driven out by fires at what is known as "Biikebrennen", and in Hungary the "Busho" - frightening characters wearing wooden masks - do a similar job. "Four seasons - Many traditions" is a journey, meeting people who are passionate at keeping old traditions alive.

programme.title: Snowy Owl: Queen of the North
programme.desc: No other owls are capable of surviving the extreme conditions, whereas the snowy owl is able to hunt through six months of bright sunshine and six months of twilight. This film follows a pair of snowy owls as they breed on the tundra of the High Arctic, 300 miles inside the Arctic Circle. Lemming numbers are low this year. Five owlets hatch and they face a struggle if any are going to survive.

programme.title: Gronland
programme.desc: Greenland is the largest island in the world and the landmass closest to the North Pole. 80% of the country is covered by a layer of ice up to 3000 meters thick. Most of the inhabitants of the country are spread over the breathtaking landscape of the ice-free west coast. The country is mostly inhabited by Inuit, who have been feeding on what nature has provided them for thousands of years. But the original life is in a state of change. The modernisation of society and man-made global warming threaten the Arctic natural paradise that is so incredibly important for our planet. Through the eyes of locals we get to know the authentic Greenland.

programme.desc: Route 66 is lined with wonderful and informative attractions. Here are just a few of those must-see stops!

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Sink your teeth into these delicious bites from snacks to five star dining on Route 66.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Paul and Nick cook for some descendants of the Reverend McGregor, the Ulster-Scot who led five ships to New Hampshire in 1714. In the same graveyard where Rev McGregor is buried, Paul discovers a gravestone with his own father's name on it, and wonders if there could be a connection.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Paul and Nick are in Washington D.C. - the capital city and political stronghold of the United States. They are cooking for former White House Press Secretary and Ulster-Scot - Mike McCurry and his friends and family.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: From lobster lovers to badass lobsterwomen, the charming seaside village of Rockland offers something for everyone—especially during the Rockland Lobster Festival, a delightful combination of games, art, and some of the freshest lobster you'll find anywhere.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: For over 50 years, bikers from around the world have gathered in Colorado to race the Durango & Silverton Narrow Gauge Railroad Train through the Rocky Mountains, over two mountain passes.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Just two hours north of Charlotte, Banner Elk offers a wide array of year-around activities for outdoor enthusiasts, but is most well known for their annual Highland Games, one of the largest celebrations of Scottish culture and tradition anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America. Into America's Wild is a non-stop ride via kayak, train, bike, hot air balloon and more that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

programme.title: USA Through Film 2
programme.desc: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city's heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There's this ‘all senses on overload' side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places - S2 E02
programme.desc: Nowhere else in Sabah live as many wild and rare animals as along the river

programme.title: Asia

programme.desc: The jungle of Vietnam is nearly impenetrable and there are parts where no human has ever set foot on before

programme.title: Asia

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places - S2 E05
programme.desc: The Baima snow mountain reserve is one of the most mysterious and impenetrable regions of the world

programme.title: Treasures of Lima
programme.desc: This is a story about a island in the pacific, which is steeped in myths and legends of treasure hunters

programme.title: Berlin from Above
programme.desc: Unique pictures from above. This documentary shows a different angle of people and country, during a glide flight above the metropolis. More than 25 years after the reunion between East and West Germany, this movie shows pictures from different perspectives. Which visions and dreams marked this region? What changed and what emerged in Germany's tensed city. We take a look from above to see the city and its citizens. Due to high quality flight recordings and panorama pictures, we are able to see how the people make this area their home. The movie unites nature, urbanity, tranquility and the rush of a metropolis. It unites parks and skyscraper canyons, lake capes and wetlands, curvy courses of rivers and straight streets. With exhilarating pictures we take a trip through Berlin- from sunrise til sunset. Due to high quality flight recordings and panorama pictures, we are able to get a glimpse at how the people make this area their home.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: There are very few regions that appear as untouched as the Yukon Delta in eastern Alaska. This fascinating and pristine landscape consists of a maze of swamps and streams that one could easily picture as the cradle of humanity.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: The Ebro Delta lies to the south of Barcelona. Its beaches and lagoons are a unique refuge for migratory and native bird species. The delta is known, for example, for its numerous pink flamingos that nest near the white-glistening salt pans.

programme.title: Street Art Challenge

programme.title: Street Art Challenge

programme.title: Street Art Challenge

programme.title: Beyond The Beaten Path

programme.title: Beyond The Beaten Path
programme.desc: By pick-up truck, the brothers route is the culturally and geographically rich island of Cape Breton and the Cabot Trail. Lobster fishing, hooking, moose sightings, Bingo, Scottish ceilidhs, Mi'kmaq drum session, it's all happening in this episode.

programme.title: Beyond The Beaten Path
programme.desc: The brothers attain their goal of riding motorcycles to the heart of Nicaragua, through the jungle to the isolated beaches of the Pacific coast and back inland: through Spanish-colonial towns, local villages and the huge volcanic island of Ometepe.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It's all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This year's event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leader's position for the season. Don't miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The World's Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we've picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they'll be going all out against each other. It's now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let's start the action.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it's the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it's about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World's Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'Refreshing Tracks' Playlist

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Promise' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics, written by DOYOUNG, capture the feelings he couldn't easily express as his love grew deeper. Even if the confession comes late, it delivers a sincerity and emotional resonance stronger than any other words.The title track “Promise” is an impressive ballad that begins with a minimal piano melody and gradually builds emotional depth as strings are added in the latter half.

programme.title: MINHO 민호 'TEMPO' MV
programme.desc: The title track “TEMPO” is a dance song that creates a cool vibe with its groovy 808 bass and a variety of rhythmic instruments. The lyrics convey the message of approaching the other person at the pace they desire. In addition, the performance is designed with bold, dynamic movements that highlight MINHO's distinctive physique, along with choreography that matches the song's groovy mood. The latter part of the performance, featuring impressive synergy with the dancers, is expected to deliver an energetic atmosphere that everyone can enjoy together.

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.”

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.EXO has returned with a new trailer.

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)' Live Clip
programme.desc: With Belle participating as a featuring artist and harmonizing with DOYOUNG, the synergy between the two elevates the charm of the song even further.The track “Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)” is an R&B ballad that depicts a moment of exchanging feelings through the sound of a whistle. Layered over a jazz guitar melody, the sweet vocals blend together like a conversation, conveying a lovely sense of fluttering excitement.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony hurts her leg and must stay in bed instead of heading off for a grand adventure. A disappointed Honey proves to be a very impatient patient, that is until Strawberry Shortcake and her friends work together telling stories and...

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Best You Can Bee
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the urging of Honey Pie Pony, Strawberry & Friends decide to put on a Cooking Show. Ginger Snap invents a version of TV, which she calls Berryvision, to broadcast the show all over Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls are all gathered at the café. Strawberry is experimenting making applesauce from scratch with a mallet (and making a mess) while the rest busily make their own wrapping paper and bows for the annual gift exchange they hold in celebration of First Frost. Mr. Longface stops by and Strawberry offers him some fresh applesauce but he declines, as he doesn't care for it. He's only there for some tea and, being that he's new in town, doesn't know what the group is up to.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland. Unfortunately, she's become a bit of a diva in the process, and her self-centered behavior is about to cut her career short.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.
